like 300.

know, but...

why I went the direction I went with the exploring, you know, audience competitors.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on client strategy and discuss internal support needs.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Relay Strategy:** Propose a modular plan for the home services initiative, framing it as a full upsell or a test within the current scope (e.g., 50% capacity). This addresses their conflicting goals and recent budget uncertainty.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Ambient Support:** Talal will schedule a chat with Bailey to align on priorities and strategy, providing the "show and tell" context Alberto requires to manage internal pressure.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [**Relay Goal:** Drive a decision on home services. The goal is to secure an upsell, but the fallback is a focused test within the current plan to get a clear signal faster than their past fragmented tests.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)

## Topics

### Relay Strategy: Home Services Initiative

  - [**Problem:** Relay's goals are unclear, creating a challenge for the upsell proposal. They are undecided between a full expansion (hub sites) and a smaller test within the current $20k/mo plan.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Solution → Modular Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Option 1 (Upsell):** A full expansion with increased content production (e.g., 30 articles/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [**Option 2 (Test):** A focused test within the current plan, allocating a portion of capacity (e.g., 50%) to home services.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [**Speed to Signal:** A focused test (e.g., 1–2 service types) yields a clear signal faster than a fragmented approach.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [**Strategic Framing:** Connects the upsell to their bold year-end revenue goal (\~$300k) and the opportunity to own an underserved audience.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**Other Content Adjustments:**](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [**Dissolve AI Cluster:** Reabsorb content into persona-specific clusters (e.g., accountants, contractors) where it performs better.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [**Increase Comparison Content:** Double down on a proven content format.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

### Relay Client Dynamics

  - [**Context:** Bethany's recent call framed the engagement as an "experiment," a shift from prior conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [**Possible Drivers:**](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [**Internal Pressure:** Bethany may be pushing Dave to be more critical.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [**Budget Changes:** Year-end budget reviews may have reduced their available funds.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
      - [**Impatience:** Frustration over the back-and-forth on the upsell.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [**Action:** Bailey will seek a direct conversation with Bethany to understand the context behind this shift.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

### Ambient Client Support

  - [**Problem:** Alberto requires significant "show and tell" to manage internal pressure, stemming from a difficult client handoff and the project being a major personal bet.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [**Solution:** Talal will schedule a chat with Bailey to align on priorities and provide strategic context.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
      - [Propose the modular home services plan to Relay, requesting a call with Bethany.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
      - [Schedule a chat with Talal to align on Ambient strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/h42ADRjrKHjEpnEBQmxfk9hCxNAxeW28?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

action_items.description: Email Relay: home-services modular plan + upsell; request Bethany on call; if no, reschedule
Schedule sync w/ Talal re: Ambient priorities
